finding_results.notes: The ending now moves directly from the failed notebook line to one additional concrete turn and then the final admission, without re-explaining the revelation.
Nate's collapse is carried by physical reaction, the hand-on-letter inventory of violated relationships, the failed notebook entry, and the residual shaking rather than essayed moral diagnosis.
Ray's remembered line is now fresh wording that still clearly marks Nate's exposed ignorance on the client call.
The post-email section now spans 17 lines, avoids re-paraphrasing the email chain, names Dominic's moral position only in the last sentence, and ends on a single declarative.
The chapter now contains one surviving 'not because ... but because' construction, and it remains in the first half before the email discovery.

summary: Replaced the calibration-derived Ray recollection, compressed the post-discovery stretch into an embodied collapse, and rebuilt the ending so the notebook failure and final admission land without redundant moral paraphrase.
